body:
and I WHOOPED Sen. Cornyn, if I do say so myself.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c8c/7f51f7bc/47068d7c/4efb8576/3999474015/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

I just got off the debate stage, and I am FIRED UP! Texans deserve better than John Cornyn, y'all -- and on November 3rd, we're going to send him packing.

I don't think I could have done as well tonight as I did without the support of this grassroots team, Peter. Brandon told me that we hit our goal just half an hour before I took the stage, and y'all, I am SO grateful for all of you!

Early voting starts just four days from now, and Election Day itself is coming up QUICK. I'm going to need everyone on this team to dig deep in these last weeks to make sure we get some real leadership in Washington. **[With our double match still in effect until midnight, please pitch in and have TRIPLE the impact!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c8c/7f51f7bc/47068d7c/4efb8575/3999474015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201009.4nd__2276__&amount=10")**

I know that with this grassroots army on my side we can defeat Sen. Cornyn this November. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: Election Alert: Schroder Doubles-Down That “Nothing Else Matters” Except Far-Left Climate Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
Chabot Campaign Deploys Automated Calls to 150,000 Voters After Schroder Repeatedly Claims That “Nothing Else Matters” in Back-to-Back Congressional D
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jugzik-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-r/) **Election Alert: Schroder Doubles-Down That "Nothing Else Matters" Except Far-Left Climate Agenda** _Chabot Campaign Deploys Automated Calls to 150,000 Voters After Schroder Repeatedly Claims That "Nothing Else Matters" in Back-to-Back Congressional Debates_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 9, 2020Contact: Jon ConradiPhone: (513) 202-4023Email: [jconradi@fp1strategies.com](mailto:jconradi@fp1strategies.com)CINCINNATI -- Chabot for Congress sent an election alert call to more than 150,000 voters following back-to-back debates for Ohio's first congressional district in which Kate Schroder repeatedly claimed "nothing else matters" except a far-left climate agenda."Socialist Squad Schroder is doubling-down on her claim that 'nothing else matters' except an extreme, far-left climate agenda, including AOC's Green New Deal, while Ohio families and small businesses are battling a pandemic," said Chabot for Congress spokesman Jon Conradi. "Schroder's repeated insistence that 'nothing else matters' during the debates demonstrates clearly that she is fundamentally out-of-touch with the thousands of people in the first district grappling with the pandemic, small businesses struggling to stay open and health care workers and first responders on the frontlines risking their own health to save lives."**Chabot for Congress Election Alert (October 9, 2020): "**Hello, this is an important election alert, in the back-to-back debates for Ohio's first congressional district, Kate Schroder repeatedly claimed that 'nothing else matters' except an extreme, far-left climate agenda that would devastate Ohio jobs. Schroder said in her own words that nothing else matters except for her Socialist Squad agenda, including the radical Green New Deal. Thousands of people in the first district are grappling with the pandemic, small businesses are struggling to stay open and health care workers on the frontlines risking their own health to save lives -- but to Kate Schroder, nothing matters except AOC's Green New Deal. Vote NO on Socialist Squad Schroder. Paid for by Chabot for Congress. 513-662-8000."Listen to the Chabot for Congress election alert [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-y/).**SCHRODER 'S "NOTHING ELSE MATTERS" BACKGROUND****In back-to-back debates for Ohio 's first congressional district this week, Kate Schroder doubled-down on claims that "nothing else matters" except a far-left climate agenda. ****Cincinnati Enquirer Debate, 10/8/20** "When she said 'nothing else is going to matter,' she said she was referring to the importance of addressing climate change. 'If we don't address climate change, none of us will be here,' Schroder said." (Cincinnati Enquirer, [Steve Chabot goes after Kate Schroder on climate change, Green New Deal in Enquirer debate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-j/), 10/8/20)**Local 12, Cincinnati Chamber, Cincinnati Business Courier Debate, 10/7/20** "'If we don't address climate change, nothing else will matter because if we don't have our climate, our world, our globe, none of us will be here. It's a huge issue in this community,' Schroder replied." (Local 12, [Ohio 1st Congressional District candidates face off in Local 12 debate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-t/), 10/7/20)**Kate Schroder Twitter, 10/7/20** "... if we don't address climate change, nothing else matters..." (Kate Schroder [Twitter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-i/), 10/7/20) **This is not new. Schroder has consistently claimed that "nothing else matters" other a far-left climate agenda throughout the course of her entire campaign:**_Schroder: "Climate to me is the existential crisis facing our country and our world. So, all these other issues we are talking about are not going to matter at all if we continue on this path. Like, none of us are gonna be here, so we have to address it. And I do feel very strongly that we have to move to net zero emissions by 2050 and put a price on carbon." -- (Kate Schroder, Bold New Democracy: Conversations with Kate and Nikki, Urban Artifact, 2/18/20)_**Including vocally supporting the extreme Green New Deal put forward by New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, that would upend the economy, eliminate millions of jobs, cost every American home $70,000 in its first year and cost $93 trillion over ten years:**
> _Forum Attendee: "Would you support, probably, the Green New Deal?"__Schroder: "Oh yeah"__Forum Attendee: "Yeah?"__Schroder: "Yeah... yeah, I mean I think, I think there are so many things for me it's like what do we have the political will to move on with that. I mean nothing else is going to matter." _
(Kate Schroder, OH-01 Candidates Night with the League of Women Voters & Warren County Democratic Party, 400 Justice Dr, Lebanon, OH 45036, 2/19/20, [Link](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-d/)) ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-k/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jugzik-kujkulhluu-u/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jugzik-kujkulhluu-b/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jugzik-kujkulhluu-a/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jugzik-l-f)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jugzik-961825B2-kujkulhluu-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jugzik-kujkulhluu-v/)

body:

| | Friend, As you know, Election Day is less than four weeks away. This coming week is financial crunch time for our organization and will decide where we allocate resources for the rest of the election. There are some very promising things coming from candidates all across the state. They are working harder, organizing better, and building movements smarter than I have ever seen before. **We would love to expand our election map, but we have to reach a few internal milestones before we can.** The contributions you make over this weekend will help us determine whether we can help someone make it across the finish line and earn a desk in the House Chamber. **Will you make a contribution today so that we can expand our election map and flip even more seats on Election Day?** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BM8MzFX7kQXmBA_Es19bLGMCtBxl4C6Aosqfm9ludYM=/c3_csQzTDct1Mdy4az9XEJAxwTymwoKJsZMTGFxBW8c=?refcode=101020SMH) This is personal for me, and it should be personal for you too. From Washington, D.C. to Minnesota, Republicans are taking their attacks on our health care, our democracy, and our civil rights to the mainstream. We need to reject Trump's politics of division and come together to build a better future for everyone. Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BM8MzFX7kQXmBA_Es19bLGMCtBxl4C6Aosqfm9ludYM=/c3_csQzTDct1Mdy4az9XEJAxwTymwoKJsZMTGFxBW8c=?refcode=101020SMH)

Hello, I’m about to head out for a full day of campaign events this Saturday morning, so I’ll keep this brief. Wednesday is the very last FEC fundraising deadline of this election. clean_body: | Hello, I’m about to head out for a full day of campaign events this Saturday morning, so I’ll keep this brief. Wednesday is the very last FEC fundraising deadline of this election. And it is not an exaggeration to say that how we perform at this deadline could very well determine whether we win or lose. That’s because right now, while our opponent is up on the air spreading false attacks about us, our campaign is facing a significant budget gap. We need to close it by Wednesday’s deadline. So I’m asking: Will you make a contribution to our campaign today? Anything you’re able to contribute will go a long way: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything, Amy P.S. Please take care of yourself and family first and only contribute if it makes sense for you. If you would like to receive fewer fundraising emails,._ Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress Amy Kennedy for Congress P.O. Box 247 Brigantine, NJ 08203 United States

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Vaccinations, Jobs, and Pre-K-12 Testing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap of the announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEJv-RAnB8AOw_5zHGo2HMwKsBRa_x8T4PKIrhtuEL2OroHRVQBGyY2OqXsmIxWI8LkToYFWYbdLnI4D80v2d67YZwEC1qqZKwMEN41kHZPybG3NlI-gMOJAhV5s330k3tE1HPXlprnDpjMwBX8L7jP4O3I0LY9_zdvEgFeLPR_YdMj4YwueMvph-tf9C8qTyxPgazj666DPgtaDaUfMY1k6wioptY6L34oWXXecgpNbsTLyMjETmYhTyOU8nn9CNVRZQxZDh0QV05nmIF0vNnRo=&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINATIONS
Rhode Island consistently ranks first or second in the nation annually for our flu vaccination rates. This year, to keep our communities safe while we combat the spread of COVID-19, we're setting our sights even higher and setting an ambitious goal of getting 90% of Rhode Islanders vaccinated. So, I'm asking you to make a plan today to get you and your family vaccinated, and together we can protect the health of our fellow Rhode Islanders.

One of the main reasons that Rhode Island has been a national leader in flu vaccination is that we have built the infrastructure to make getting your shot easy, fast, and inexpensive no matter where you live in the state. The State's Vaccine Advisory Committee governs Rhode Island's leading vaccine program. This week, I announced that I am convening a [special subcommittee](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEJv-RAnB8AOw642zCQELRMFdgCxjZADYOfedrjwRYv-fOjdEiAOkrbD8wDRcfGqUQinXRu1kWOowZI2VQanyZX6uq1Pmbn3EcB38ef_fz4uAxoKGJrQ0VwM=&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==) of this group with the sole focus of planning for the COVID-19 vaccine whenever one is available. This team, comprised of epidemiologists, primary care providers, pharmacists, pediatricians, long-term care advocates, ethicists, nonprofit leaders, school leaders, faith leaders and others, will be responsible for developing an independent process for evaluating the vaccine's safety and efficacy and for advising us on the distribution of the vaccines.
| | |
---|---
|
JOB OPPORTUNITIES

This week Infosys [posted immediate job openings](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEAipUP6c6OaYpicTRyQK3_B8Y_eLi2zNQjv3fJ9DyQGuG70zGLiVc2C0qDSYuifynzcXOkJ2EHIhI_G6x7D2U6lhZk9pO5_KHZS2ZNr7vAq2hL17tf-0KFI=&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==) for their Providence office. Many of these jobs are targeted at Rhode Islanders without experience in the field. You don't need to have a background in tech - you just need to be willing to learn. Infosys will train you with the skills necessary to be successful and compete in this digital world.

If a job in tech isn't what you're looking for, we've also made a call for substitute teachers. The Department of Education has developed a free program with the [Highlander Institute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEAipUP6c6OaYpzg184RLFoXtCjqVwrctP-yqBK9jzLo6gN27wsCBbsbNh8K-cUjBYl_P95qTnma1S5YwXYxPC-hx4SUs_FBQ8eIYOVXX0A1OyUACQhv9e_M=&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==) to provide training for Rhode Islanders to start as substitute teachers this fall for in-person and virtual teaching. Candidates who successfully complete this course will be included on a hiring list that will be shared across the state. If you're interested in being a substitute teacher this year, you can go to [www.back2schoolri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEAipUP6c6OaY8t9rD1o6wSx_EoVRYt40ECN5X-EcYNDXRKBGUxVjb9ORpZxUwWvIZiMNgQvYRZV8-pfOPiPoAcTmFbuwq_i0MQ==&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==) for information on these opportunities.
| | |
---|---
|
PRE-K-12 TESTING

So far, we've performed nearly 6,000 tests through our Pre-K-12 testing system. Those tests have identified 109 cases, for a total percent positive of around 2%. Combined with results from other testing structures, we have identified a total of 250 cases in our Pre-K-12 community among students, teachers and staff.

Of the 250 cases identified so far, nearly half are from students and staff who never set foot in a classroom this year, despite the fact that the majority of students, teachers and staff are back in school buildings. Throughout Rhode Island, 95 schools have seen a positive case, and the overwhelming majority -- 69 schools -- saw only one case. That means in all those cases, we were able to immediately isolate the positive case before the virus had a chance to spread to others. And for those 26 schools that had more than one case, many of them had only two, and these have generally been siblings or other individuals not connected through the school.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_L9HXqd3NGwnDFgHaDpp6ZuBpDxtTeDvWGxZyCTfvRcuR99xiYwpEJv-RAnB8AOw4oQ322fd_YvTHhCouhCE66UY52KqnhERqMQupDWjzuPU80B1CANBSYUYhChYwz_d4as1Vg0Fm-dOjzyCfiqrckVTIVsNru31Ceze-CGXAbX2Hx1PGrhcBovGDeGObZd7OpZupZpqxVUPukZM_TD27_h69mjCeNA3qYl7KTcjEfQTqkmZJy3_UJneRrs4kBRYgqLNoSTGwGxfpJPgqkEnUrc6E_iNgUmDgI-ISuT2-Jo1apcCHR2fcC5h-lEj4h-4o7JAmmyJPB0=&c=kBzsqAzEofjp8pkczyPSx6VBiOIDQFittO79XqpPhIwgx1_sq8poZg==&ch=PgauDeBynygy8iSDKfujOQ-eKme3CSzvJQYRz2nDmftjAnnTvyvtXw==).
---

I’m humbled by the outpouring of support we’ve received from people who want change here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and around the country.
Friend,

I’m humbled by the outpouring of support we’ve received from people who want change here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and around the country. Thanks for stepping up to provide the resources we need to keep our ads on TV.

I can defeat Vern Buchanan, and deliver accountability to Washington, but I’ll be honest it’s a tough fight going up against a candidate who is bankrolled by corporate PACs and can loan themselves money at the drop of a dime.

But I also know that I can count on you to step up when I need you most, and for that I’m incredibly grateful. Our campaign is strong, thanks to you.

Thank you for your continued support,

Margaret

**The _Lexington Herald-Leader_ has endorsed Josh!!**
This is a huge development in the race for Kentucky’s Sixth Congressional District, not only in the endorsement itself, but also in the strong case the _Herald-Leader_ Editorial Board made for Josh’s election.
The Board wrote:
_“Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it... Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives.”_
One of Josh’s core values is appreciation, and as a team, we deeply appreciate all that you have done to help us get to this point in the race. We are grateful to everyone who has helped us grow this campaign — whether you’ve contributed financially, given political advice, or simply shared Josh’s story with your friends, family, and community. This endorsement will give us critical momentum heading into the final stretch of the campaign, and we couldn’t have gotten here without you.
**We couldn’t have asked for a stronger endorsement, or clearer confirmation that Josh’s message and story are resonating.**
[_**Please make a contribution today**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151594/255872731/21104712?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201010HLendorse_TH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=) to help us continue to grow our campaign, and build on this momentum. Then, help us share the news about this endorsement and the campaign — you can text, email, or post the news to social media using this custom ActBlue page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicksendorsement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151595/255872732/21104712?refcode=share&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=)
Thank you again for all your support — we appreciate you!
Team Hicks

P.S. If you want to read the full endorsement from the Herald-Leader Editorial Board, we’re including it here:
**The 6th District deserves better: We endorse Josh Hicks for Congress**
By the Lexington Herald-Leader Editorial Board
_It would be hard to find a race with a more stark comparison between candidates than Kentucky’s 6th District race for the U.S House of Representatives: The Republican incumbent, U.S. Rep. Garland Hale “Andy” Barr IV, grew up in a patrician Lexington family that belonged to the[Idle Hour Country Club](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151597/255872734/2082523793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=&emci=8a354671-fe0a-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=13e352f7-1a0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) while Democratic challenger Josh Hicks worked his family’s tobacco patch on a Fleming County farm._
_They are both lawyers, it’s true, but Barr has spent most of his career in politics, first at the state level, then in Congress, while Hicks worked construction, joined the Marines, became a police officer and then worked his way through law school._
_Those experiences have shaped two very different sets of values, making it clear that Hicks best represents the 6th District’s widely varied voters, from the streets of Lexington to the rural areas that encircle it. Barr declined an interview with the editorial board, but the choice to endorse Hicks is an easy one based on his background, his temperament and his priorities for Kentucky’s working families on issues such as health care, education and taxes._
_We offer our sincere condolences to Barr, who recently lost his wife, Carol._
_And we congratulate him for his persistence in getting a successful House vote on a[much-needed bill on racetrack safety](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151598/255872735/-1934513883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=&emci=8a354671-fe0a-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=13e352f7-1a0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662). Barr also does an efficient job with constituent services and veterans’ issues._
_But his[passionate enabling](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151599/255872736/1822109267?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=&emci=8a354671-fe0a-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=13e352f7-1a0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) of President Donald Trump, his embrace of tax cuts and COVID-19 relief for the richest and most powerful, and his continued attacks on the Affordable Care Act — which cut Kentucky’s uninsured rates in half — make Barr more suited to helping a few families in rich ZIP codes than the middle- and working-class families spread out across the 6th District._
_By contrast, Hicks grew up on a farm, where he “scraped and shifted to get by.” Growing up and working in rural areas that have often been left behind, he’s seen why health care is so important, why we need more affordable avenues to higher education, and better infrastructure, including desperately needed broadband access across the deprived countryside. Like many rural Kentuckians, he grew up as a Republican but became a Democrat, as he explained last year: “Once somebody becomes the party exclusively of corporate special interests, that’s not what I believe government is intended to do.”_
_Hicks thinks government is still a force for good, but believes too many Kentucky voters are disenchanted and disengaged from the political system, which explains the low rate of voting in rural areas._
_“They don’t believe either party is helping them,” he told the editorial board. “It’s an entire repudiation of the entire political system.”_
_In 2018, Barr beat back a tough challenge from Amy McGrath by painting her as too liberal. He’ll be hard-pressed to use that argument this time around; Hicks supports a public option for health care, rather than Medicare for All, and says that while we must stop climate change, he would not support a Green New Deal._
_Unlike Barr, who often touts his support for coal, Hicks understands that coal is not actually a big presence in the 6th District, and noted that the “war on coal,” cited by Republicans during the Obama administration, was full of “empty rhetoric.” But he also supports coal as a continued presence to meet America’s future energy needs._
_Hicks also understands the extraordinary political moment we are in right now. Unlike Barr, who recently denied there is systemic racism in policing, Hicks is a former police officer who knows how complicated the problem can be, and supports a decrease in congressional funding of military hardware and training for police._
_Barr’s attack ads have been particularly crass this time around; he tried to paint Hicks as an enemy of health care providers who help COVID-19 patients, while failing to say that Hicks’ lawsuits against a hospital and a pharmaceutical company[were filed in 2019](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20151600/255872737/-856280124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2UzNTJmNy0xYTBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsrCBP1NkyXj5CXD23Jy4YJRjbgdVCYvh-r5Df8HgAk=&emci=8a354671-fe0a-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=13e352f7-1a0b-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662), well before the pandemic began._
_Under Kentucky’s senior U.S. Senator, the Republican Party pays lip service to working-class families while honoring only the rich, a tradition that Barr has happily joined. Hicks points out correctly that there just aren’t that many farm boys like him in Washington, D.C., and we agree there should be. We wholeheartedly endorse Josh Hicks for the 6th District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives._

| Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent the hardworking, everyday folks of Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Would you help me say thank you, Patriot?
body:
I owe a huge debt of gratitude to our incredible team here in Florida... the men and women who have tirelessly fought for this campaign every step of the way.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690) I owe a huge debt of gratitude to our incredible team here in Florida... the men and women who have tirelessly fought for this campaign every step of the way.

**I’m planning to buy the entire team lunch as a special thank you... and[I was hoping you’d help me with a gift of $10](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690).**

[**Will you help me thank them for all their hard work, by chipping in just $10 now?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690)

Running a campaign is hard work. The job is never done. There’s always another email to send out, or yard sign to put up, or voters to chat with.

This team has gone above and beyond, every single step of the way. And things are only going to get busier these next 24 days ahead of Election day.

It makes a huge difference, and I couldn’t be more appreciative to have such a talented group of patriots helping me win this race.

[**Will you help me show them how much we appreciate all their hard work?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690)

[**Please chip in just $10 now--help me say thank you.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-5235935-56193cbab5-0e6ea30690)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-396707-934532-84585d41bbe610b-0e6ea30690)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: what you do today will make a difference on November 3rd.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
Election Day is just around the corner and I wanted to reach out and take a moment to give you an update on where we stand at this point in the race. [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=2ed456a9577d41f782d7cdd7f3ff823b&_e=0XLWFnuQdQw7bNmb4DDGJYkGRvVUDuU_GmAqhaozLqd4scwVevgBPKE1tEEgwrY3AUBhXBrjn5GKEp_UghH1WWhm0oycK2MZvhFkB1Ma6Ge8LpRXdarM3o_jL4iTe9qvrrJfxMUlP4axa_Ga8MhtHiFL0PMNXhxYrEND9hxeXzk6qI7KOCwDQwmeIuerTHtneKYJk6AWvpA_YEHARE0XSIUiPedY_GXbSlH1OhV8i_Uu7x41e4j9tj3LQ1O4D6X-Nd_Ee7N0yVxH6du4mYG83GPU7VeZGuSoK4JpvLMzXXM62WExDv-4Iel_CxOZAdBE6LkB78KNl3jk90Vff7PpzZGkoyNb-dRvlaUXIL1zi95t9cFDSNNANoV6r7cVcqPBK91ofesjIPHbDs19btxunnnGDnbwespEEB-p4FBIXM2wbxmivX0y22L7_XcRoXkUdTybLU7QpP7b7IUXAc4GI4gtqpmWp-gof57dd_VmvkA%3D) Hey friend - got a second?
Election Day is just around the corner and I wanted to reach out and take a moment to give you an update on where we stand at this point in the race.
**I’ll be blunt — our campaign has been on a roll. **
We outraised Democrat Congressman Cunningham for the first time by _**half a million dollars(!!)**_ this last quarter of the election, proving that our grassroots movement is unmatched and that voters are rallying around our Lowcountry first message.
_And that’s not all — I joined Democrat Congressman Cunningham on the debate stage and took him to task for abandoning the Lowcountry to advance Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agenda — including voting to put Parris Island (and the 6,000 jobs and nearly $800 million it brings to our district) on the chopping block. _
It’s been a huge couple of weeks, and there’s no doubt our campaign is surging at just the right time.
**But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **
_This is it, friend, the final sprint to Election Day is here and we need to go all out from here on in. That’s why I’m asking everyone in our grassroots community to put some skin in the game. _
My team just launched a four-day fundraising drive called - **[“Donate the Date.”](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=2ed456a9577d41f782d7cdd7f3ff823b&_e=0XLWFnuQdQw7bNmb4DDGJYkGRvVUDuU_GmAqhaozLqd4scwVevgBPKE1tEEgwrY3TNBKxos6A8JMx-apYYjVKLeqwRsEg3Ewwn_3EOiICH9excvJTOJ3fZym5rvJlaI16F-BMqDsoxJHDROGyU1iHZAh6vbWSGEaGufFO0KxZU6JJ0PLNOnSeJGGNY3PPRhiqp_Rae5pV21-UKeTy1IxNBwh9rc2TMzPwHsAN9JYKAGxB39CBkSHouHYnOumuE0_IRpZkzhNk6eeS6lmu6L0TxXUyKxXKf6t620G8_p3AxYkEbGz-j8uNZ2iwlgq1iW-5hdS1DHP-MZzc1eQjm3bo_dcTqFgsoj5ZP7LbvCSwC3FmDIBQF901XwL9LzfKhK2URaEG9ElEhkGwi8cvjY9qIHo7pZpYHytzdp7bAkat-cr-R42uhoQ94C4A_08CuoiUjHn8IYtvxMRChTN-V5oXACIJ-1sCQXR_8yx0coHo6JNOaXoUsp4XtUCDyk7XWE-)** We’re asking our community to chip in a small-dollar donation that matches the date of the ask.

clean_body: Election Day is just around the corner and I wanted to reach out and take a moment to give you an update on where we stand at this point in the race. Hey friend - got a second? Election Day is just around the corner and I wanted to reach out and take a moment to give you an update on where we stand at this point in the race. I’ll be blunt — our campaign has been on a roll. We outraised Democrat Congressman Cunningham for the first time by half a million dollars(!!) this last quarter of the election, proving that our grassroots movement is unmatched and that voters are rallying around our Lowcountry first message. And that’s not all — I joined Democrat Congressman Cunningham on the debate stage and took him to task for abandoning the Lowcountry to advance Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agenda — including voting to put Parris Island (and the 6,000 jobs and nearly $800 million it brings to our district) on the chopping block. It’s been a huge couple of weeks, and there’s no doubt our campaign is surging at just the right time. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. This is it, friend, the final sprint to Election Day is here and we need to go all out from here on in. That’s why I’m asking everyone in our grassroots community to put some skin in the game. My team just launched a four-day fundraising drive called - - We’re asking our community to chip in a small-dollar donation that matches the date of the ask. Today, we’re asking for just \- can I count on you to come through for me? Donate below. Thank you for your support, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f6/3647922764/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Mark Warner is working hard in the Senate to make life better for every Virginian. Our team will continue to send these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with Mark's priorities.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* In his latest campaign ad "It Has To End," [**Mark addresses the tragedy of veteran suicide.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f5/3647922764/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/new-warner-campaign-ad-emphasizes-work-to-end-tragedy-of-veteran-suicides/") Seventeen veterans commit suicide a day -- and more than 60 percent of those veterans have never interacted with the Veterans' Administration. Mark is leading a bi-partisan effort to make sure that our veterans have access to the health resources (including mental health resources) that they need.

* [**Mark continues to press for accountability and transparency**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f4/3647922764/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-urges-facebook-twitter-google-to-reinforce-efforts-against-political-content-abuse/") standards on social media platforms in the final weeks before the election on November 3rd. In a letter to CEOs of social media companies, he calls out failure to reign in organic spread of misinformation online.

* A Senate version of Rep. Gerry Connolly's _Chai Suthammanont Remembrance Act_ was introduced by Mark. [**The bill would require every federal agency to develop a detailed plan to protect their employees**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f3/3647922764/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wfmynews2.com/article/news/investigations/legislation-passed-after-covid-death-of-quantico-worker/65-72b4c068-1709-4a3b-9c32-56d76ac8bae5") if they are required to return to work during the coronavirus pandemic. Mark will continue to work to protect essential workers during the pandemic.

* Mark is working to make sure that restaurants have the funding they need to continue running. [**As the weather gets colder, restaurants are worried about the longevity of their business,**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f2/3647922764/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wtop.com/virginia/2020/10/sen-warner-im-committed-to-getting-to-yes-on-restaurant-aid/") with vital public health restrictions still in effect.

* Mark met [**with the presidents of the University of Mary Washington and Germanna Community College**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f1/3647922764/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fredericksburg.com/news/local/presidents-of-umw-germanna-spell-out-higher-ed-needs-for-sen-warner/article_fe32845e-54f5-5db6-bf8e-42508f066ec6.html") to discuss the challenges these institutions are facing during the COVID-19 pandemic. Colleges and universities have struggled with a lack of clear guidance on how to reopen safely, and Mark is focused on making sure that schools have the resources they need to provide for students during this time and beyond.

* [**In a letter to Secretary of State Mike Pompeo,**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1f0/3647922764/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-pushes-for-clarification-regarding-h-2b-visas-for-seafood-companies-seeking-seasonal-employees/") Mark urged the U.S. Department of State to secure H-2B visas for seasonal seafood workers. Seafood is a half-billion-dollar economy in Virginia, and Mark will work to ensure that small, seasonal Virginia seafood companies won't have to face financial hardship due to difficulty securing these visas.

* Facebook announced their ban on accounts, pages, and groups associated with the right-wing conspiracy theory group QAnon in order to prevent the spread of misinformation on their platform. Mark has been consistent in pressuring Facebook to follow through with their preventative measures and [**weighed in on the decision.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1ff/3647922764/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/mark-warner-on-facebook-announcement-of-ban-on-qanon/")

* Voter registration ends in Virginia on October 13. Now is the time to check your registration at [**www.iwillvote.com**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1fe/3647922764/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/") while there's still time. It takes less than five minutes and once you are registered, you can participate in early voting ahead of Election Day on November 3rd.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1fd/3647922764/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201010_e_1_fl__859__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1fc/3647922764/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da4b/53d9897e/55a5a211/1c88f1fb/3647922764/VEsHBw/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

body:
Thank you Mr. Attorney General |
---
| |
---
| |
# Attorney General Supports Downing
Attorney General Tim Fox has endorsed Troy Downing for State Auditor. Across the state, Downing has supported our first responders and Law Enforcement and they have supported him.

Downing understands the risks that everyone who wears a uniform takes protecting our country, states, and communities and will always have their backs.

Thank you Attorney General Fox for your endorsement. Downing looks forward to serving all Montanans in the Treasure State.

Check out what our AG has to say about this race>>>>>>

name: Darin LaHood
subject: The most dangerous threat we’ve faced in decades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
The Chinese communist regime is in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=6a05d17f3343415f815a250bbe883813&_e=PKWIgoUwCFZc8ralBqz3lXt9HHT8aQR2FCCAXQYObuDzesW4_xQ7M6IA3vwZVq_oSmhl0PQXUViIZtZZ9V5G-QIOdKJFg-xJYcbjjmbW1yn3lhhMMnz0z4sqp_x1LhmRuqyEADHaLPR0ILhcXVfHtKj_jLLxPsh00t4orgrp0cSGIWNAYLvtoBSQOaMpV3_2eir0QGyt8by6D6zngMU07y4h0yFhbB8OYECZlUw7K2YNw0adsnzxVmDndGGnWWviaadC9PvMRbjGFQ-1GNr_43IU2UGaAVFI47Ny_QNJSQIb6DYz11IxAv2ehwyrE6699P0MYOgVb8VohK9NaAnS4DPHz_PhsvcAJDq0usuhMpJylBL3Cay8dw_MetDz9y8A0-GsxiWUMaNzC95agImRqYgbdjPKlotynv57LevnCSuhiQLVvLRPMOeQGZ_YEH_7bbPtkZLYw1rO4Z2OtljMm95s94CxIF4tZ0eqz_hGs1I%3D)
|
---
Friend,

There’s no doubt about it:

**China’s communist regime is the most dangerous threat our economy, our military, and our nation have faced in decades.**

Chairman Xi and the rest of the Chinese Communist Party are in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy in any way they can in order to build themselves up into the most dominant power on the globe, and the last thing we can afford to do is treat this as a partisan issue.
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REIN IN CHINA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=6a05d17f3343415f815a250bbe883813&_e=PKWIgoUwCFZc8ralBqz3lXt9HHT8aQR2FCCAXQYObuDzesW4_xQ7M6IA3vwZVq_oSmhl0PQXUViIZtZZ9V5G-QIOdKJFg-xJYcbjjmbW1yn3lhhMMnz0z4sqp_x1LhmRuqyEADHaLPR0ILhcXVfHtKj_jLLxPsh00t4orgrp0cSGIWNAYLvtoBSQOaMpV3_2eir0QGyt8by6D6zngMU07y4h0yFhbB8OYECZlUw7K2YNw0adsnzxVmDndGGnWWviaadC9PvMRbjGFQ-1GNr_49EZ0XI3iyNUGJh_W87pafNoxy4zgcOFYe9xg0KpHOETUyIgpr7eZrAHRsKC2Z2lc0xlbS7Vy8fMFlrK7pQjeigzKrtjPb4lX6sqqY5YmT-IqDKjT8AfkElTW7guZox188G53GUBVT01T2La4k3ouDp0CHkTejC7RlYgHMekfsjTG9QScLTefyEEqcbr2nlwVARF3zfF6XTR_y44pwXsvic%3D)
They’re doing this by infiltrating our universities, harvesting critical intellectual property from businesses of all types and sizes, and holding supply chains hostage which they used against us at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**We’re at a critical juncture as a nation and it’s time to confront their threats head-on. **

_Unfortunately, that’s the last thing on Nancy Pelosi’s to-do list, and she’s even taken her refusal to lead on this issue a step further by barring Democrats from joining the House China Task Force that I serve on._

That’s why Republicans are leading the charge to create millions of jobs by bringing our critical supply chains back to our shores so that pharmaceuticals, PPE equipment, and other medical supplies are made in America again.

**Friend, will you add your name to join us in the fight to rein in China and keep America strong, prosperous, and secure?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REIN IN CHINA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=6a05d17f3343415f815a250bbe883813&_e=PKWIgoUwCFZc8ralBqz3lXt9HHT8aQR2FCCAXQYObuDzesW4_xQ7M6IA3vwZVq_oSmhl0PQXUViIZtZZ9V5G-QIOdKJFg-xJYcbjjmbW1yn3lhhMMnz0z4sqp_x1LhmRuqyEADHaLPR0ILhcXVfHtKj_jLLxPsh00t4orgrp0cSGIWNAYLvtoBSQOaMpV3_2eir0QGyt8by6D6zngMU07y4h0yFhbB8OYECZlUw7K2YNw0adsnzxVmDndGGnWWviaadC9PvMRbjGFQ-1GNr_41082YZ4YX5LcLLGw7XSP1vH8pD-c5TbU5dEhZHWi2uWzZxMwv1PUHSKmmlKLWW2ibxlrKIoN23-aZIzZj8HBVRuT3wQVuxwb3mOteJRZXj_gantTnYP7ACBVst1_PxPiXpUBKkU32nbKuvJZnG1i8ehophh5TCV2PUWU7pZWTR3zbgFLyabdyiKnjsJdKS34NH4BOAfcE0YYssdDtu0kAA%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

clean_body: The Chinese communist regime is in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy | | | Friend, There’s no doubt about it: China’s communist regime is the most dangerous threat our economy, our military, and our nation have faced in decades. Chairman Xi and the rest of the Chinese Communist Party are in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy in any way they can in order to build themselves up into the most dominant power on the globe, and the last thing we can afford to do is treat this as a partisan issue. They’re doing this by infiltrating our universities, harvesting critical intellectual property from businesses of all types and sizes, and holding supply chains hostage which they used against us at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic. We’re at a critical juncture as a nation and it’s time to confront their threats head-on. Unfortunately, that’s the last thing on Nancy Pelosi’s to-do list, and she’s even taken her refusal to lead on this issue a step further by barring Democrats from joining the House China Task Force that I serve on. That’s why Republicans are leading the charge to create millions of jobs by bringing our critical supply chains back to our shores so that pharmaceuticals, PPE equipment, and other medical supplies are made in America again. Friend, will you add your name to join us in the fight to rein in China and keep America strong, prosperous, and secure? Thank you, Darin LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates and Events [October 10, 2020]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- While it is 24 days until November 3,[ 7 million voters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=543e7b94c8&e=d6c5c7d7ec) have already cast their ballots and about a million more are voting every day! A majority of states are already voting, including Colorado, Alaska, and Montana, where ballots were mailed yesterday.
The success of [ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0bcfce0549&e=d6c5c7d7ec) has been record-breaking. Voters continue to use it as a resource to check registration status, register to vote, learn about the choices available to cast their ballot, and to find out where and when to vote. See below the widget that you can now add to help promote it!
I know how time during COVID can make a few days feel like a few weeks but we are still so very proud of Senator Harris’ debate performance this week. Senator Harris made the case to the American people on how the Biden-Harris administration will contain COVID-19, build the economy back better, and bring our country together. She was singularly focused on talking to voters at home about what a Biden-Harris White House will mean for their lives and the issues important to them. We also quickly linked Flywilvote.com to iwillvote.com which once again saw a surge in traffic.
This week both campaigns went to Arizona and Nevada. The Biden Bus made a stop in Window Rock, Arizona for the First Week of Voting and / Battle for the Soul of America Bus Tour. Vice President Biden and Senator Harris made a point to visit with tribal leaders, and committed to ensuring tribes have a seat at the table and honoring the Nation to Nation relationship. The successful release of the Biden Harris [Plan for Tribal Nations](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=45143ddfb1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) underscores their commitment.
Nevada lawmakers condemned the Pence rally plan on the heels of the suspected 'superspreader' White House event. NV state Sen. Yvanna Cancela questioned whether Pence should visit after 1,600 Nevadans died from the virus. “I am horrified by Mike Pence and this entire administration’s constant attempts to gaslight the American people and doubt the severity of this crisis,’ Nevada Sen. Yvanna Cancela said.”
"Nevadans have lost their jobs, their lives, their loved ones, and any sense of normalcy. That’s not a ‘great job.’ It’s a devastating betrayal of Trump and Pence’s responsibility to keep people safe. Nevadans have had enough, and they’re putting this failed presidency to an end," said Democratic National Committee Chair Tom Perez.
Ahead of Pence’s rally in Boulder City the DNC War Room released a new television ad, “[Had Enough?](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a466ff4f70&e=d6c5c7d7ec),” contrasting Trump’s claim that his administration has done a “great job” responding to the pandemic with the devastating reality of his failed response.
And the NYT highlighted: “Pence touted the administration’s handling of the coronavirus pandemic, claiming they saved “countless American lives.” Trump contracted the virus last week and the country’s death toll has topped 211,000. The pandemic has hit Nevada particularly hard with tourism down and unemployment at one of the highest rates in the country.”
Vice President Biden traveled to Las Vegas where he spoke at an event with Latino leaders in East Las Vegas followed by a successful drive-in event. Biden encouraged voters to visit IWillVote.com and outlined his plan to do what Trump has failed to— contain COVID-19 and get the American people the help they need and deserve.
On Thursday, Trump said [he would not participate in a virtual debate](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=04c1a58780&e=d6c5c7d7ec) next week. Vice President Biden was prepared to accept the debate commission’s proposal for a virtual town hall, but he refused because he does not want to face questions from the voters about his failures on COVID and the economy. As a result, Biden will instead take questions from voters at an [ABC primetime town hall](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0c55b91756&e=d6c5c7d7ec) on October 15, as he has done on several occasions recently.
Vice President Biden looks forward to participating in that final debate on October 22. Trump can show up, or he can decline again. That’s his choice. Given his refusal to participate in next week’s planned town hall debate, we hope the Debate Commission will make the final October 22 debate a town hall format, so Trump is not able to evade accountability. Voters should have a chance to ask questions of both candidates, directly.
Trump is pushing to restart crowded, largely maskless [rallies](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a076138f2c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) while he is potentially still infected with COVID-19. Only a week after being diagnosed, Trump’s campaign and the White House have never taken proper safety precautions against the coronavirus. Instead of taking responsibility for his behavior, Trump shamefully and without evidence[ blamed Gold Star families](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=950fe6268e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for giving him coronavirus. Trump’s disrespect for veterans and military families has no end.
This administration has failed to ensure the health and safety of so many in this country, especially our children. According to the Miami Herald, “Florida has seen the [second-largest increase of uninsured children](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c52d0d9e14&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in the nation during the first three years of President Donald Trump’s administration.” This administration continues to put our lives at risk.
The failed plot to kidnap Governor Whitmer was not just chilling, it better be another powerful reminder of what is at stake. As our dear partners at the Democratic Governors Association shared, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer called out the President’s hateful rhetoric after the FBI thwarted a plot to kidnap her.
“Hate groups heard the President's words not as a rebuke, but as a rallying cry. As a call to action. When our leaders speak, their words matter." Yours in the Fight,
Mũthoni
---
|
---
| In this Update:
* Senator Kamala Harris Won the Debate
* Biden Campaigns Plan for Tribal Nations
* DNC Af Am and AAPI ads released with Latinx rolling out next week
* IWillVote.com New Widget
* AP Article “ A senior warning sign for Trump: 'Go Biden' cry at Villages”
* DNC Voting Education Autoreply Campaign
* Download the Vote Joe App
* Campaign, Volunteer, and Phone Banking Opportunities
* Vice President Biden: Updates
* DNC Statements and Press Releases
* Upcoming Events

---
|
---
| **Senator Kamala Harris Won the Debate** After the vice presidential debate, the DNC War Room[ released a video](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f2583b9858&e=d6c5c7d7ec) of Senator Harris calling out Pence for lying about the Trump administration’s record on coronavirus and health care. What we saw from Pence was more of the same [lies and interruptions](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=94823936cb&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Pence was completely unable to answer for his and Trump’s failures. In sharp contrast to Pence’s lies, Senator Harris spoke directly to the American people. She spoke to working families about how the Biden-Harris administration will contain COVID-19, build the economy back better, and bring our country together.

**Trump and Pence have no plan for the issues facing American families.**
* Pence still wouldn’t outline a plan to address the coronavirus.
* Pence and Trump still don’t have a plan to protect health care for Americans with pre-existing conditions.
* Pence didn’t answer the moderator’s questions — either to explain the failures of the last four years or what Trump and Pence will do in the next four.

**Just because Pence doesn’t shout, doesn’t mean he didn’t lie and interrupt.**
* Pence mansplained and interrupted Senator Harris and Susan Page.
* Pence didn’t answer the questions he was asked.
* Pence was rude, ineffectual, weak.

---
|
---
| **Biden Campaigns Plan for Tribal Nations** This week, the Biden Campaign released its [Plan for Tribal Nations](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a919942381&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Following the release of the plan, the DNC’s own Native Caucus Chair Rion Ramirez made the following statement: "Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have a bold vision for Indian Country – one built on trust, respect, sovereignty, and economic opportunity. The plan they put forth today is the most progressive plan ever authored by a presidential nominee in the history of our great country. As Chair of the DNC Native Caucus, I am proud to stand with them as we fight for a better future for our tribal nations." Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris are committed to upholding the U.S.’s trust responsibility to tribal nations, strengthening the Nation-to-Nation relationship between the United States and Indian tribes, and working to empower tribal nations to govern their own communities and make their own decisions. With over 574 federally recognized Native American tribes in the United States, the Biden-Harris plan will:
* Strengthen the Nation-to-Nation relationship
* Provide reliable, affordable, quality health care and address health disparities
* Restore tribal lands, address climate change, and safeguard natural and cultural resources
* Ensure Native communities are safer and tackle the crisis of violence against Native women, children, and the elderly
* Expand economic opportunity and community development in Native communities
* Invest in education and youth engagement
* Meet obligations to and commemorate Native veterans
* Ensure Native Americans can exercise their right to vote

---
|
---
| **DNC Af-Am and AAPI ads released with Latinx rolling out next week** **DNC Releases “Our Lives are on the Ballot.” ** This week, the DNC launched an [ad campaign](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a50efc07da&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in African American newspapers and radio stations across eight battleground states, directing readers and listeners to IWillVote.com. **Biden Campaign Reaches Out to AAPI Communities in New Ad** The Biden team announced a [paid media campaign](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=afc17e49f8&e=d6c5c7d7ec) targeting the AAPI community that will air in 16 states across the country.
---
|
---
| **IWillVote.com New Widget** We’re excited to release the [new IWillVote voting location widget for your website](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1aa3df1b5b&e=d6c5c7d7ec). It is a great way to help voters access up-to-date voting location information.

You can embed the widget on your website and customize the style. Voters can then enter their address directly on your website and see their voting location options on [IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ef534aabd0&e=d6c5c7d7ec). The widget is available in English and Spanish. Access the widget & customization details here: [https://democrats.org/iwv-widget/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=635ef3e80e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Note: If you are using a previous version of the IWillVote widget, you will need to update to the new version by 10/15. After 10/15, the previous version will no longer be available. Who can use the widget? Any organization, campaign, or person can use the widget! | **AP Article “ A senior warning sign for Trump: 'Go Biden' cry at Villages”** An AP [article](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=749d1ae228&e=d6c5c7d7ec) featured a story on Biden supporters, in The Villages parading around the community on golf carts. Trump appears to be losing support, within this Florida community that was once considered a Republican stronghold. A parade of over 300 golf carts supporting Democratic presidential candidate former Vice President Joe Biden caravanned to the Sumter County Elections office to cast their ballots during early voting Wednesday, Oct. 7, 2020, in The Villages, Fla. (AP Photo/John Raoux) Then she let out a whoop and two surprising words: “Go Biden!” It’s not a cry that might be expected to resound in The Villages, and it’s certainly not one that is encouraging to President Donald Trump. Older voters helped propel him to the White House — the Pew Research Center estimates Trump led among voters 65 and older by 9 percentage points in 2016 — and his campaign hoped they would be a bulwark to cement a second term.

| **CAMPAIGN, PHONE BANKING, AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES** Full-Time Paid Positions 2020 Victory is seeking Regional Get Out the Vote Directors to help battleground states implement GOTV and Early Vote programming. You can read the job description and apply [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=714278c7de&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Ideal candidates are available to start ASAP and live in their state. Check out pages for the [DNC Coordinated Campaign](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=05e8ec0962&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Biden for President](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b07f41097b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for additional job openings. **Volunteer Late Help** If you have campaign experience and are able to take some time off of work, the Biden campaign is in need of both long-term (4 weeks, starting October 5) and short-term (4 or 10 days) late help. Late help will plug into various roles in states - helping with trainings, operations needs, and supporting various departments as needed by the state. Sign up [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e4537d2d82&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to indicate your interest in being placed; the campaign will begin reaching out to determine assignments soon. **Join the Call Crew** If you’re not able to join for a stretch of time but want to help the campaign, you can make calls or send texts from home. Join the [call crew](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eb6475d634&e=d6c5c7d7ec) or [text team](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ecd016e750&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and find more opportunities at the Biden for President [Action Center](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dbbfd26b26&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Please share these links with friends and family!

**Voter Protection Hotline Support**
We still need thousands more voter protection team members ready to help ensure eligible voters can cast a ballot. There are only a few weeks left to recruit the additional help we need. Join us for a phone bank to help with this effort! This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot! [National Voter Assistance Hotline!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2039fd6153&e=d6c5c7d7ec) (833-DEM-VOTE)
Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection
When: Now! We have shifts every day!
What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by staffing the national voter protection hotline, answer questions from voters around the country and help people exercise their right to vote!
Why is it urgent: Voting has started in many states and more people than ever are calling our hotline with questions about how to request their ballot in the mail or navigate in person voting this fall. This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot!
Length of Commitment: A shift is typically 3 hours.

**Voter Protection Attorneys**
Poll Worker Opportunities/Volunteering on the ground: [DNC](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dff2e30841&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [BFP](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4338d16bbe&e=d6c5c7d7ec) may have in-person opportunities for attorneys to assist with election efforts on the ground. DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. We are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. We also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). | **VICE PRESIDENT BIDEN: UPDATES**
* Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris traveled to Arizona where they greeted American Indian tribal leaders in Phoenix. Following that, they delivered remarks before embarking on a “Soul of the Nation” bus tour to meet with small business owners in Phoenix and Tempe, as well as voters on the second day of early voting. You can watch their full remarks [ HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fc8dcf63bb&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Vice President Joe Biden will travel to Las Vegas, Nevada. In the morning, he will make an East Las Vegas community stop followed by remarks at a drive-in event. You can watch[ HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f3d3328be3&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Dr. Jill Biden will join Biden for President Ohio to kick off a virtual Get Out the Vote phone bank. Biden will thank volunteers and discuss the importance of making a plan to vote and voting early.
* Doug Emhoff will travel to Colorado Springs where he will join State Senator Pete Lee and Coloradans to discuss their health care stories in a listening session.
* Senator Kamala Harris's[ interview](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=03a6ff3191&e=d6c5c7d7ec) with singer Becky G on her podcast, En La Sala published. In the conversation, Senator Harris spoke about the importance of voting, prosecuted the case against Donald Trump, and reflected on her mother’s immigrant experience.
* Dr. Jill Biden traveled to the Philadelphia suburbs, including Delaware and Montgomery Counties, to encourage voters to cast their ballots for the Biden-Harris ticket by voting early in their communities. Biden visited the campaign’s Voter Activation Center in Jenkintown, Montgomery County. Biden met with down ballot Democratic candidates and encouraged women in Delaware County to make a plan to vote early at[ iwillvote.com/PA.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fe47f97f2c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Doug Emhoff traveled to Colorado to join a car rally with Gov. John Hickenlooper, Congresswoman Diana DeGette, Denver Mayor Michael Hancock, and State Representative Leslie Herod.
* Biden for President released a groundbreaking new ad,[ "Cherries"](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3b1223b721&e=d6c5c7d7ec), in Michigan. It is the first time a presidential campaign has ever aired a televised ad exclusively focused on climate change in a battleground state in a general election
* Doug Emhoff joined Paid Leave for the United States Action Fund (PL+US Action) for a pre-debate “Conversation on Care” with Katie Bethell, Founder and Executive Director of PL+US Action.
* Vice President Joe Biden delivered powerful remarks in Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, where he reinforced his unrelenting belief that we are in a battle for the soul of the nation. — but it’s a battle we’ve won again and again throughout American history, and that we can and will come together and win it again. You can[ watch](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7ca89bde5c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and[ read](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dd512f2c08&e=d6c5c7d7ec) his full remarks.
* Elle Magazine published its November[ cover story](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f1579d2ea0&e=d6c5c7d7ec) featuring Kamala Harris. Emphasizing her core values of justice, dignity, and freedom, Senator Harris shared, “At this moment in time, it is so critically important in our country for all people to be seen in their full selves, in a way that gives them the dignity they deserve.”

---
|
---
| **DNC STATEMENTS AND PRESS RELEASES**
**New DNC Video: Trump and Pence Peddle Same Coronavirus Lies** Ahead of the vice presidential debate, the DNC War Room released a [new video](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a27a3b4446&e=d6c5c7d7ec) highlighting how Pence, the chair of the White House Coronavirus Task Force, has [consistently repeated the same lies](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=50b7ddeab2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Trump peddles about the pandemic.
**DNC on Trump’s Child Separation Policy** DNC Chair Tom Perez [released](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=17ceb83153&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the following statement after reports that Donald Trump’s former Attorney General Jeff Sessions said in a 2018 meeting, ‘We need to take away children’: “‘We need to take away children.’ It is hard to imagine crueler words than those. And yet, that is exactly what the Trump administration said two years ago when they initiated their child separation policy. As a former assistant attorney general at the Justice Department under President Obama, I am appalled by such a gross abuse of power. Not only did the Trump administration willfully separate children from their families, but they lied about it. There are not enough words to fully capture the depravity of this administration and the suffering Donald Trump and Jeff Sessions caused. No matter how many years pass, these horrors will leave an indelible mark on our history. Now we must move forward by electing leaders of empathy and compassion. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris know that families belong together. And they will ensure this country lives up to its place as the world’s beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.”
**Trump Abandons Struggling Americans And Puts Our Economy At Further Risk** Trump has made clear that he has no interest in the human and economic toll of a pandemic that continues to ravage the country and wreck our economy because of his failed response. In a tweet, Trump abruptly [walked away from stimulus talks](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3805faa1b7&e=d6c5c7d7ec) until after the election, once again abandoning millions of Americans who are in need of relief.
**DNC on Trump Pulling Out of COVID-19 Relief Package Talks** DNC Chair Tom Perez released the following statement after Donald Trump tweeted his reckless decision to pull out of negotiations over a COVID-19 relief package: “Donald Trump has abandoned the American people yet again. First, he cut unemployment benefits. Now he’s playing politics with lifesaving COVID relief. This pandemic is not over — average Americans are still facing overwhelmed hospitals, mass layoffs, and an uncertain future. Over 210,000 Americans have died from this virus and counting, millions are still out of work, and Donald Trump thinks we’re out of the woods? Americans need relief. They need a president who understands their suffering and will act to end this pandemic, not someone who only cares about his election prospects. Donald Trump refuses to put the American people first. That’s why we need Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are committed to ending this pandemic, providing the American people with the relief they need and deserve, and helping our nation build back better.”
---
|
---
| **UPCOMING EVENTS**
* Progressive For Biden Gun Violence Prevention Roundtable Discussion with former Rep. Gabby Giffords will be held on Saturday, October 10 at 3PM ET. This event will highlight how important this election is to gun violence prevention, how the Biden-Harris agenda to end gun violence is the most progressive of any Democratic candidate, and provide opportunities for how advocates can make a difference. RSVP [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b3c0f44990&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Senator Sherrod Brown will be held on Saturday, October 10 at 3pm ET. Senator Sherrod Brown will be joining this phone bank with Progressives for Biden! Senator Brown will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c8a501ca3c&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Maurice Mitchell will be held on Sunday, October 11 at 2pm ET. Maurice will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls. RSVP [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b7f3785c06&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
* Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Ashley Judd will be held on Sunday, October 11 at 5:30pm ET. Ashley will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls RSVP [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2d3950907b&e=d6c5c7d7ec).
