clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends- While it is 24 days until November 3, have already cast their ballots and about a million more are voting every day! A majority of states are already voting, including Colorado, Alaska, and Montana, where ballots were mailed yesterday. The success of has been record-breaking. Voters continue to use it as a resource to check registration status, register to vote, learn about the choices available to cast their ballot, and to find out where and when to vote. See below the widget that you can now add to help promote it! I know how time during COVID can make a few days feel like a few weeks but we are still so very proud of Senator Harris’ debate performance this week. Senator Harris made the case to the American people on how the Biden-Harris administration will contain COVID-19, build the economy back better, and bring our country together. She was singularly focused on talking to voters at home about what a Biden-Harris White House will mean for their lives and the issues important to them. We also quickly linked Flywilvote.com to iwillvote.com which once again saw a surge in traffic. This week both campaigns went to Arizona and Nevada. The Biden Bus made a stop in Window Rock, Arizona for the First Week of Voting and / Battle for the Soul of America Bus Tour. Vice President Biden and Senator Harris made a point to visit with tribal leaders, and committed to ensuring tribes have a seat at the table and honoring the Nation to Nation relationship. The successful release of the Biden Harris underscores their commitment. Nevada lawmakers condemned the Pence rally plan on the heels of the suspected 'superspreader' White House event. NV state Sen. Yvanna Cancela questioned whether Pence should visit after 1,600 Nevadans died from the virus. “I am horrified by Mike Pence and this entire administration’s constant attempts to gaslight the American people and doubt the severity of this crisis,’ Nevada Sen. Yvanna Cancela said.” "Nevadans have lost their jobs, their lives, their loved ones, and any sense of normalcy. That’s not a ‘great job.’ It’s a devastating betrayal of Trump and Pence’s responsibility to keep people safe. Nevadans have had enough, and they’re putting this failed presidency to an end," said Democratic National Committee Chair Tom Perez. Ahead of Pence’s rally in Boulder City the DNC War Room released a new television ad, “,” contrasting Trump’s claim that his administration has done a “great job” responding to the pandemic with the devastating reality of his failed response. And the NYT highlighted: “Pence touted the administration’s handling of the coronavirus pandemic, claiming they saved “countless American lives.” Trump contracted the virus last week and the country’s death toll has topped 211,000. The pandemic has hit Nevada particularly hard with tourism down and unemployment at one of the highest rates in the country.” Vice President Biden traveled to Las Vegas where he spoke at an event with Latino leaders in East Las Vegas followed by a successful drive-in event. Biden encouraged voters to visit IWillVote.com and outlined his plan to do what Trump has failed to— contain COVID-19 and get the American people the help they need and deserve. On Thursday, Trump said next week. Vice President Biden was prepared to accept the debate commission’s proposal for a virtual town hall, but he refused because he does not want to face questions from the voters about his failures on COVID and the economy. As a result, Biden will instead take questions from voters at an on October 15, as he has done on several occasions recently. Vice President Biden looks forward to participating in that final debate on October 22. Trump can show up, or he can decline again. That’s his choice. Given his refusal to participate in next week’s planned town hall debate, we hope the Debate Commission will make the final October 22 debate a town hall format, so Trump is not able to evade accountability. Voters should have a chance to ask questions of both candidates, directly. Trump is pushing to restart crowded, largely maskless while he is potentially still infected with COVID-19. Only a week after being diagnosed, Trump’s campaign and the White House have never taken proper safety precautions against the coronavirus. Instead of taking responsibility for his behavior, Trump shamefully and without evidence for giving him coronavirus. Trump’s disrespect for veterans and military families has no end. This administration has failed to ensure the health and safety of so many in this country, especially our children. According to the Miami Herald, “Florida has seen the in the nation during the first three years of President Donald Trump’s administration.” This administration continues to put our lives at risk. The failed plot to kidnap Governor Whitmer was not just chilling, it better be another powerful reminder of what is at stake. As our dear partners at the Democratic Governors Association shared, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer called out the President’s hateful rhetoric after the FBI thwarted a plot to kidnap her. “Hate groups heard the President's words not as a rebuke, but as a rallying cry. As a call to action. When our leaders speak, their words matter." Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni | | In this Update: Senator Kamala Harris Won the Debate Biden Campaigns Plan for Tribal Nations DNC Af Am and AAPI ads released with Latinx rolling out next week IWillVote.com New Widget AP Article “ A senior warning sign for Trump: 'Go Biden' cry at Villages” DNC Voting Education Autoreply Campaign Download the Vote Joe App Campaign, Volunteer, and Phone Banking Opportunities Vice President Biden: Updates DNC Statements and Press Releases Upcoming Events | | Senator Kamala Harris Won the Debate After the vice presidential debate, the DNC War Room of Senator Harris calling out Pence for lying about the Trump administration’s record on coronavirus and health care. What we saw from Pence was more of the same . Pence was completely unable to answer for his and Trump’s failures. In sharp contrast to Pence’s lies, Senator Harris spoke directly to the American people. She spoke to working families about how the Biden-Harris administration will contain COVID-19, build the economy back better, and bring our country together. Trump and Pence have no plan for the issues facing American families. Pence still wouldn’t outline a plan to address the coronavirus. Pence and Trump still don’t have a plan to protect health care for Americans with pre-existing conditions. Pence didn’t answer the moderator’s questions — either to explain the failures of the last four years or what Trump and Pence will do in the next four. Just because Pence doesn’t shout, doesn’t mean he didn’t lie and interrupt. Pence mansplained and interrupted Senator Harris and Susan Page. Pence didn’t answer the questions he was asked. Pence was rude, ineffectual, weak. | | Biden Campaigns Plan for Tribal Nations This week, the Biden Campaign released its . Following the release of the plan, the DNC’s own Native Caucus Chair Rion Ramirez made the following statement: "Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have a bold vision for Indian Country – one built on trust, respect, sovereignty, and economic opportunity. The plan they put forth today is the most progressive plan ever authored by a presidential nominee in the history of our great country. As Chair of the DNC Native Caucus, I am proud to stand with them as we fight for a better future for our tribal nations." Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris are committed to upholding the U.S.’s trust responsibility to tribal nations, strengthening the Nation-to-Nation relationship between the United States and Indian tribes, and working to empower tribal nations to govern their own communities and make their own decisions. With over 574 federally recognized Native American tribes in the United States, the Biden-Harris plan will: Strengthen the Nation-to-Nation relationship Provide reliable, affordable, quality health care and address health disparities Restore tribal lands, address climate change, and safeguard natural and cultural resources Ensure Native communities are safer and tackle the crisis of violence against Native women, children, and the elderly Expand economic opportunity and community development in Native communities Invest in education and youth engagement Meet obligations to and commemorate Native veterans Ensure Native Americans can exercise their right to vote | | DNC Af-Am and AAPI ads released with Latinx rolling out next week DNC Releases “Our Lives are on the Ballot.” This week, the DNC launched an in African American newspapers and radio stations across eight battleground states, directing readers and listeners to IWillVote.com. Biden Campaign Reaches Out to AAPI Communities in New Ad The Biden team announced a targeting the AAPI community that will air in 16 states across the country. | | IWillVote.com New Widget We’re excited to release the . It is a great way to help voters access up-to-date voting location information. You can embed the widget on your website and customize the style. Voters can then enter their address directly on your website and see their voting location options on . The widget is available in English and Spanish. Access the widget & customization details here: Note: If you are using a previous version of the IWillVote widget, you will need to update to the new version by 10/15. After 10/15, the previous version will no longer be available. Who can use the widget? Any organization, campaign, or person can use the widget! We want to ensure all voters can easily access voting information, so please with anyone who might be interested. | | AP Article “ A senior warning sign for Trump: 'Go Biden' cry at Villages” An AP featured a story on Biden supporters, in The Villages parading around the community on golf carts. Trump appears to be losing support, within this Florida community that was once considered a Republican stronghold. A parade of over 300 golf carts supporting Democratic presidential candidate former Vice President Joe Biden caravanned to the Sumter County Elections office to cast their ballots during early voting Wednesday, Oct. 7, 2020, in The Villages, Fla. (AP Photo/John Raoux) Then she let out a whoop and two surprising words: “Go Biden!” It’s not a cry that might be expected to resound in The Villages, and it’s certainly not one that is encouraging to President Donald Trump. Older voters helped propel him to the White House — the Pew Research Center estimates Trump led among voters 65 and older by 9 percentage points in 2016 — and his campaign hoped they would be a bulwark to cement a second term. | | DNC Voting Education Autoreply Campaign The DNC is continuing to expand its voter education efforts by launching a Twitter auto-reply campaign that will provide voting information directly to users who opt-in by interacting with a trigger tweet from @TheDemocrats. After retweeting or liking the opt-in tweet users will receive replies and notifications to their Twitter account with real-time voting information in the final weeks leading up to Election Day. These updates include voter registration deadlines, ballot request and return deadlines, the beginning of early voting, Election Day polling hours, and voting resources. You can push the campaign to their followers by retweeting the opt-in tweets below (please note, if you choose to quote tweet the opt-in, users who like your tweet will not receive updates so be sure to retweet or instruct your followers to like the tweet from @TheDemocrats): | National | ---|--- Alaska | Alabama | Arkansas | Arizona | California | Colorado | Connecticut | DC | Delaware | Florida | Georgia | Hawaii | Iowa | Idaho | Illinois | Indiana | Kansas | Kentucky | Louisiana | Massachusetts | Maryland | Maine | Michigan | Minnesota | Missouri | Mississippi | Montana | North Carolina | North Dakota | Nebraska | New Hampshire | New Jersey | New Mexico | Nevada | New York | Ohio | Oklahoma | Oregon | Pennsylvania | Rhode Island | South Carolina | South Dakota | Tennessee | Texas | Utah | Virginia | Vermont | Washington | Wisconsin | West Virginia | Wyoming | | | DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the . Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign. | | CAMPAIGN, PHONE BANKING, AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES Full-Time Paid Positions 2020 Victory is seeking Regional Get Out the Vote Directors to help battleground states implement GOTV and Early Vote programming. You can read the job description and apply . Ideal candidates are available to start ASAP and live in their state. Check out pages for the and for additional job openings. Volunteer Late Help If you have campaign experience and are able to take some time off of work, the Biden campaign is in need of both long-term (4 weeks, starting October 5) and short-term (4 or 10 days) late help. Late help will plug into various roles in states - helping with trainings, operations needs, and supporting various departments as needed by the state. Sign up to indicate your interest in being placed; the campaign will begin reaching out to determine assignments soon. Join the Call Crew If you’re not able to join for a stretch of time but want to help the campaign, you can make calls or send texts from home. Join the or , and find more opportunities at the Biden for President . Please share these links with friends and family! Voter Protection Hotline Support We still need thousands more voter protection team members ready to help ensure eligible voters can cast a ballot. There are only a few weeks left to recruit the additional help we need. Join us for a phone bank to help with this effort! This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot! (833-DEM-VOTE) Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection When: Now! We have shifts every day! What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by staffing the national voter protection hotline, answer questions from voters around the country and help people exercise their right to vote! Why is it urgent: Voting has started in many states and more people than ever are calling our hotline with questions about how to request their ballot in the mail or navigate in person voting this fall. This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot! Length of Commitment: A shift is typically 3 hours. Voter Protection Attorneys Poll Worker Opportunities/Volunteering on the ground: and may have in-person opportunities for attorneys to assist with election efforts on the ground. DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. We are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. We also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up . Phonebanking: Team Biden Campaign Disability Coalition Weekly Phone Bank Action 7:00pm-9:00pm ET every Wednesday. Register . Veterans Military Families and Friends 4:30 to 6:00pm EST every Monday through November 2. Register . Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action Weekly Phonebank (Every Saturday at 2 PM ET): Join Sister to Sister: Mobilizing in Action and Higher Heights PAC each Saturday to make calls into key battleground states so we can win big this November. And with special guest, Congressional Candidate Desiree Tims! . Women in Power Hour Phone Bank (Every Sunday at 2 PM ET): Every week, we adopt a different swing state and make calls for an hour! All Women for Biden Events: We have so many ways to take action every week, across all our different identities. Women for Biden Weekly Phone Bank- Women across the United States come together to phone bank for Vice President Joe Biden! This phone bank includes a short training at the beginning of the event. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register . Women for Biden: Millennials & Gen Z Weekly phone bank-Join young women from across the country every Wednesday night at 8pm ET for a virtual phone bank to help elect Joe Biden. Training will be provided every Wednesday at the start of the call. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register . Texas Muslim Phonebanking for Biden. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register National AAPIs for Biden Weekly Call & AAPIs Assemble! Join Asian Americans & Pacific Islanders (AAPIs) for Biden every Wednesday through Election Day, as we come together--or Assemble! to hear from leaders and surrogates from the AAPI community during our National AAPI Program at 7:00 PM ET/ 4:00 PM PT. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register . Spanish-language voter contact events (Phone banks, text banks). Join various Spanish language events across the US, including phone banks, text banks, house parties and planning meetings with Latino communities. Register . Latino Victory & Todos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register . Dominicanos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register . Venezolanos con Biden: Haz Llamadas a Florida! Virtual Phone Bank. Join the Venezolanos con Biden team every Saturday from 2-4pm ET and make phone calls to voters in South Florida to support Joe Biden and all Democrats on the ballot. In this online event we will provide phone banking training and then we'll start making calls! We will have a facilitator to answer any questions for the duration of the phone bank. We will make calls into South Florida to Spanish and English speaking voters. Every vote counts and every call made brings us closer to victory in November. Volunteer with us and help us create change! Every Saturday at 2pm ET. And they will ensure this country lives up to its place as the world’s beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.” Trump Abandons Struggling Americans And Puts Our Economy At Further Risk Trump has made clear that he has no interest in the human and economic toll of a pandemic that continues to ravage the country and wreck our economy because of his failed response. In a tweet, Trump abruptly until after the election, once again abandoning millions of Americans who are in need of relief. DNC on Trump Pulling Out of COVID-19 Relief Package Talks DNC Chair Tom Perez released the following statement after Donald Trump tweeted his reckless decision to pull out of negotiations over a COVID-19 relief package: “Donald Trump has abandoned the American people yet again. First, he cut unemployment benefits. Now he’s playing politics with lifesaving COVID relief. This pandemic is not over — average Americans are still facing overwhelmed hospitals, mass layoffs, and an uncertain future. Over 210,000 Americans have died from this virus and counting, millions are still out of work, and Donald Trump thinks we’re out of the woods? Americans need relief. They need a president who understands their suffering and will act to end this pandemic, not someone who only cares about his election prospects. Donald Trump refuses to put the American people first. That’s why we need Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are committed to ending this pandemic, providing the American people with the relief they need and deserve, and helping our nation build back better.” | | UPCOMING EVENTS Progressive For Biden Gun Violence Prevention Roundtable Discussion with former Rep. Gabby Giffords will be held on Saturday, October 10 at 3PM ET. This event will highlight how important this election is to gun violence prevention, how the Biden-Harris agenda to end gun violence is the most progressive of any Democratic candidate, and provide opportunities for how advocates can make a difference. RSVP . Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Senator Sherrod Brown will be held on Saturday, October 10 at 3pm ET. Senator Sherrod Brown will be joining this phone bank with Progressives for Biden! Senator Brown will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls. Register . Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Maurice Mitchell will be held on Sunday, October 11 at 2pm ET. Maurice will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls. RSVP . Progressives For Biden Phone Bank With Ashley Judd will be held on Sunday, October 11 at 5:30pm ET. Ashley will give a briefing on the state of the race and some motivating words before volunteers start making calls RSVP . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Week in Review, Early Voting Edition!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

First and foremost, I want to make sure you know that Early Voting is upon us! This **Tuesday, October 13th, the polls open for two weeks of Early Voting**. You can vote at any of the locations on our list, not just at your precinct. **Find your nearest polling location by following the link below.**
[](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=99c7636397&e=68aaeb0998)
The remaining presidential debates may be canceled, but ours will go on! I'm excited for **our first debate this Monday, October 12th**, and am looking forward to highlighting the clear contrast between myself and my opponent.

Hosted by AJC and Temple Shalom, this Zoom debate will take place the day before Early Voting starts. I hope you’ll watch and cheer me on, or if you’re undecided, I look forward to earning your vote.

[Follow this link to register to watch the debate.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=f2cbe27331&e=68aaeb0998)

Finally, the endorsements continue to roll in, even with voting set to start in the coming days. This week, I announced that I received the endorsement of the Business-Industry PAC (BIPAC).

**I'm the only candidate in this race with a pro-business, pro-growth platform, and I am 100% committed to getting North Texans back to work quickly and safely as we together recover from the pandemic**.

BIPAC knows I’m the only candidate in District 32 who will bring business sense and business knowhow to Congress.

Remember, Early Voting begins on Tuesday, and Election Day will be here before we know it, [so follow this link to find your nearest polling location.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=8d5a6bbcfa&e=68aaeb0998)

Thank you for your support, and I hope you have a great weekend!
---
| God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---
| | | | | | [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=f5c5d7ca87&e=68aaeb0998)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter, First and foremost, I want to make sure you know that Early Voting is upon us! This Tuesday, October 13th, the polls open for two weeks of Early Voting. You can vote at any of the locations on our list, not just at your precinct. Find your nearest polling location by following the link below. The remaining presidential debates may be canceled, but ours will go on! I'm excited for our first debate this Monday, October 12th, and am looking forward to highlighting the clear contrast between myself and my opponent. Hosted by AJC and Temple Shalom, this Zoom debate will take place the day before Early Voting starts. I hope you’ll watch and cheer me on, or if you’re undecided, I look forward to earning your vote. Finally, the endorsements continue to roll in, even with voting set to start in the coming days. This week, I announced that I received the endorsement of the Business-Industry PAC (BIPAC). I'm the only candidate in this race with a pro-business, pro-growth platform, and I am 100% committed to getting North Texans back to work quickly and safely as we together recover from the pandemic. BIPAC knows I’m the only candidate in District 32 who will bring business sense and business knowhow to Congress. Remember, Early Voting begins on Tuesday, and Election Day will be here before we know it, Thank you for your support, and I hope you have a great weekend! | God bless, | | Genevieve Collins Republican Nominee Texas Congressional District 32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC | | Copyright © 2020 COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC., All rights reserved.

Our moment is _now_.

It's time to show the country what type of candidates are able to win in 2020. Growing up a low-income, first-gen Mexican American who started working as a teenager to put food on my family's table -- people like me don't usually end up in politics.

Our campaign has hit a crucial point in the election cycle, and now more than ever, we need to get our message out to the voters who are sending out their ballots right now. **When voters hear what this movement is about, what we stand for, and what we will do for them in Congress -- they support us.**

I am a daughter of Mexican immigrants, a first-generation American who was born in the Barrio, and I'm now president of the San Diego City Council, one of the largest cities in the country.

**I am part of the immigrant community, which is a great honor and a great responsibility as a leader in politics.** Representation is so important -- if we are not represented at the table, the issues that affect our community are not being addressed or resolved in Washington.

I'm ready to represent and ensure that the problems our community is facing are addressed, like immigration reform and economic issues, people living paycheck-to-paycheck.

But unfortunately, our campaign finance system is plagued by big money, and this race is a prime example with my wealthy opponent and her grandparents spending well into the seven figures to try and buy her a seat in Congress.

**The good news is that when voters are informed about my background and plans, we win.** And that's where you come in.

**[All the time we've spent has led up to this moment. Let's make the most of it -- chip in $5 or anything you can now so we can finish strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20162209/255915967/-605652049?refcode=em20_201010_ballotdrop3_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ2NjVkNi01NjBiLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=izlpDGHL3aGmji6x_mWUvFafd5TD9n0J2vnoy_KpLrg=)**

| | Friend, Did you see Melissa's email earlier? As a Greater Minnesota State Representative and candidate, I can personally attest to the level of activity we're seeing across the state. Will you make an investment in our grassroots organization so that we can expand our election map and flip even more seats on Election Day? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=101020Olson) [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=101020Olson) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=101020Olson) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=101020Olson) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=101020Olson) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Together we can expand our majority in the Minnesota House, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House to build a better future for everyone. Thank you, Liz Olson Majority Whip Minnesota House of Representatives \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: House DFL Team <house@dflhouse.com> Date: Sat, Oct 10, 2020 at 8:36 AM Subject: Expanding the map Friend, As you know, Election Day is less than four weeks away. This coming week is financial crunch time for our organization and will decide where we allocate resources for the rest of the election. There are some very promising things coming from candidates all across the state. They are working harder, organizing better, and building movements smarter than I have ever seen before. **We would love to expand our election map, but we have to reach a few internal milestones before we can.** The contributions you make over this weekend will help us determine whether we can help someone make it across the finish line and earn a desk in the House Chamber. **Will you make a contribution today so that we can expand our election map and flip even more seats on Election Day?** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?refcode=101020Olson) This is personal for me, and it should be personal for you too. From Washington, D.C. to Minnesota, Republicans are taking their attacks on our health care, our democracy, and our civil rights to the mainstream. We need to reject Trump's politics of division and come together to build a better future for everyone. Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kt3JqLTIT2dtQIsc88PlbwL3w_Ex3gLFNZ9r_B9EDg8=/RudRrqURq0i6SCDw07ivRyx_AnX8K1yUB_KMs326M5E=?refcode=101020SMH)

subject: Police violence at home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:

| |
#
On October 2, following a traffic stop, a 21-year-old Black man was shot in the back by police in Rockford. Various incident reports exist and the investigation is ongoing. But the fact remains that, in IL-16 and all across the country, racism and police use of force are major problems. A little more than a year ago, my opponent, Rep. Adam Kinzinger, said, **“Everyone has the right to be a white supremacist.”** But he’s wrong. The right to free speech stops when your words and actions become a direct threat. We need leaders who will acknowledge that racism exists and impacts Black lives every day, not a representative who calls pleas for equality “identity politics.” [Help me get this guy out of office.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=684155f1c9&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski

body:
#
**CNN: Supreme Court vacancy brings new urgency to battle for Senate control**
Peter,
With Republicans gearing up to confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court with only weeks left until Election Day, the battle for control of the Senate has never been more urgent.
According to the latest from CNN, this Supreme Court battle has renewed Democrats' mission of taking back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell and the Republicans in November.
**[Peter, we need a Democratic Senate to protect the Supreme Court and honor Ruth Bader Ginsburg's legacy. Will you pitch in $5 to help flip the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201009-cnn?refcode=em201009i_1035&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
With a Democratic Senate majority, we'll not only be able to defend the integrity of the Supreme Court, we can move this country forward and undo the damage the Republicans have caused.
It's not enough to elect Joe Biden as our next President -- though we must take back the White House. We also need to win the fight for the Senate, including keeping this seat blue.
**[We must re-elect Dick Durbin and a Democratic Senate majority. Contribute $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201009-cnn?refcode=em201009i_1035&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

subject: polls are tightening at the worst possible time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The Maine Senate race is neck-and-neck, and polls are tightening at the worst possible time.
Team, A brand new poll shows Sara Gideon and Susan Collins polling neck-and-neck -- it's a one point race.
**And with just a few weeks left, Bangor Daily News is reporting that the race is tightening at the worst possible time.**
Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court could come down to this race so losing ground now could spell disaster. We're reaching out to you because Sara really needs your help.
[**Please rush and urgent contribution -- $3 or more -- to Sara Gideon's campaign to take back the Senate, defeat Susan Collins, and protect the Court. Please hurry, there's not much time left.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6a9/2a380d31/20aac063/f0b392/4221676239/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxMF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201010_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Outside groups linked to Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans are spending big money to save Collins' campaign, and save this Senate seat for Republicans.
Sara needs a LOT of small-dollar donations in order to keep up with their spending and keep pace in the polls. That's why we're coming to you:
[**Will you make a contribution to support Sara's campaign right away? We 're just a few weeks away from election day so your contribution couldn't come at a more important time.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc6a9/2a380d31/20aac063/f0b392/4221676239/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAxMF9NV0g0U0dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20201010_MWH4SG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

subject: How can you help? Here are four ways:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Over the past few days, our team has seen an outpouring of support, and we’re seeing a surge of grassroots energy and momentum from voters across the Fourth District that want to elect someone that can actually make government work. Many folks have reached out to ask how they can help, so we wanted to let everyone know what they can do to deliver a win on November 3rd!

1\. Make a contribution! Whether it’s $1, $5, or $100, every contribution goes a long way to making sure we can keep our team on the road and our message on the air. Our opponent is well funded, so every dollar counts!
---
| [Click here to contribute](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=749cd7ab32&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to contribute")
---
| 2\. Visit our website at [FeenstraForCongress.com](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=6bf7c44e88&e=d48ad6f8f4) \- On our website, you can sign up to join Team Feenstra, volunteer to make phone calls, put up a yard sign or barn sign, and more!
---
| [Click here to visit our website](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=a37e37b2cc&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to visit our website")
---
| 3\. Follow us on social media! You can follow us on [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=eb0ed4fc44&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=36b5b418cf&e=d48ad6f8f4) and join the conversation, follow the campaign, and keep up with the latest news!
---
| | | | | | [](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b83e80546f&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| | [](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b33b446039&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| 4\. Make sure to VOTE - Early voting has already started, so make a plan to vote, get registered, and make your voice heard!

Thank you for all you’ve done to help already – we only have a couple of weeks left before Election Day, and with your continued support we can deliver a WIN on November 3rd!

-Team Feenstra
